warnings: Activation-ready capturer direct-outreach lanes for Sacramento, CA have named targets but no explicit contact_email evidence.

buyer_target_candidates.notes: Active West Coast deployment partner for AMRs; integration workflows rely on digital-twin simulation.
One of the largest cold chain 3PL operators globally with Sacramento-area facilities. AMR deployment for dock handoff and temperature-zone navigation.
AMR maker deploying in 3PL and e-commerce fulfillment. Sacramento/Central Valley distribution centers need spatial validation for robot path planning.
Makes Tally, the shelf-scanning robot deployed in grocery and retail. Sacramento public retail sites provide immediate capture targets for their navigation validation.
